+import java.lang.reflect.Field;
+
+<class_modifiers> <class_name> <super_class> {
+    static Object[] predefined;
+<fields declarations>
+
+    public <class_name>(<constructor_args>) {
+<fields_initialization>
+        super(<super_constructor_args>);
+    }
+
+}
